title: Workflow Syntax, Expressions, YAML, and Data Contracts · Pipeline Repair Bay
summary: A release responder inherits a plausible but defective validated workflow data contract; preserve run evidence, isolate the first causal fault in workflow syntax, expressions, yaml, and data contracts, and retain a regression check. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in validated workflow data contract and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Author name, on, permissions, concurrency, env, defaults, jobs, and job-level contracts with explicit supported syntax.
Control YAML scalars, booleans, quoting, multiline blocks, reserved-looking keys, indentation, and serialization boundaries.
Reason about expression literals, loose equality, coercion, truthiness, functions, object filters, fromJSON, and toJSON without leaking data.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# cicd-github-actions cumulative delivery-system portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic workflow, policy, artifact, and release evidence review only.
# They never call GitHub APIs, start runners, execute learner commands, access Docker or registries, exchange OIDC tokens, or contact cloud services.
workspace: cicd
version-baseline:
  checkout: 7.0.0
  setup-node: 7.0.0
  upload-artifact: 7.0.1
  download-artifact: 8.0.1
  attest: 4.1.1
  node: 24-lts
  typescript-native: 7.0.2
  typescript-api-compatibility: 6.0.2
  build-push-action: 7
  google-auth: 3
  deploy-cloudrun: 3
transfer-boundary: authorized-disposable-delivery-environment
evidence:

steps.title: Inspect the failure record · Debug Ci Workflow Schema Top Level
steps.instruction:
debug case — A debug workflow parses YAML but treats false as text, expands a multiline value unsafely, uses an unavailable context, and accepts a misspelled input. Validate syntax, types, timing, shell boundaries, and a changed event fixture. Competency probe: Author name, on, permissions, concurrency, env, defaults, jobs, and job-level contracts with explicit supported syntax.

steps.title: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Workflow Static Validation
steps.instruction:
Append the CI/CD evidence item headed "  # Evidence: ci-workflow-static-validation-t9xh8y". Tailor its workflow-contract.yaml change to the current stakeholder case, retain a deterministic workflow or release review, reject one concrete failure, and record a repair. The browser analyzes text only; run GitHub Actions, runner, Docker, registry, OIDC, Google Cloud, and deployment work later in authorized disposable transfer environments.

Evidence target: Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Workflow Static Validation.
steps.why: Building a runnable or mechanically reviewable artifact turns Ci Workflow Static Validation into observable performance evidence. For Implement the cause-level repair · Debug Ci Workflow Static Validation, keep Ci Workflow Static Validation connected to mechanically reviewable workflow, trust, artifact, deployment, and recovery evidence.

content.code:
# Evidence: ci-workflow-static-validation-t9xh8y
  - competency: ci-workflow-static-validation
    artifact: workflow-contract.yaml
    decision: workflow static validation
    environment: public fork pull request with no repository write access
    fault-injection: route five percent traffic to a revision with a data incompatibility
    retained-proof: event ref SHA workflow ref workflow SHA run ID and attempt
    case-key: t9xh8y
    change: |
      name: verified-ci
      on-events: [pull_request, push]
      permissions: contents-read
      concurrency: revision-scoped
      expression-input: parsed-with-fromJSON
      shell-input: validated-environment
      schema: action-inputs-reviewed
      changed-event-fixture: fork-pull-request
    verify: validate workflow schema expressions context availability action inputs and changed event fixtures
    failure: Reject valid-YAML-only review, implicit coercion, unavailable contexts, or direct untrusted expression interpolation.
    repair: Validate workflow semantics, parse explicit types, move untrusted values through data boundaries, and test changed payloads.
content.caption: Shape of the required increment; replace generic language with the current stakeholder case.
